description: Extension cords daisy-chained together or used as permanent wiring in place of fixed outlets
visual_signals: one power strip plugged into another
extension cord running along baseboard as permanent fixture
multiple adapters chained from single outlet

description: Electrical panel front access blocked by furniture, boxes, or equipment within required 36-inch clearance
visual_signals: file cabinet positioned against panel door
stacked boxes within three feet of panel
desk pushed against electrical panel wall

description: Emergency exit door obstructed by stored materials, locked from inside, or signage missing
visual_signals: boxes stacked against exit door
chain or padlock on exit door push bar
no exit sign above emergency door

description: Fire extinguisher blocked from access, mounted too high, or showing expired inspection tag
visual_signals: furniture blocking extinguisher on wall
extinguisher mounted above 5-foot reach height
inspection tag with overdue date

description: Loose cables or cords crossing walkway floor without protective cable covers or ramps
visual_signals: power cord stretched across walkway
network cables lying on floor in traffic path
tangled cords between desks crossing aisle

description: Shelving unit visibly overloaded, leaning, or not anchored to the wall
visual_signals: shelf bowing under weight of binders
bookcase leaning away from wall
tall shelving unit with no visible wall anchor

description: Portable space heater positioned near paper, curtains, or other combustible materials
visual_signals: space heater under desk near paper stack
heater within 3 feet of fabric curtain
space heater sitting on carpeted floor beside cardboard boxes

description: Ceiling tiles damaged, sagging, or missing exposing plenum space above
visual_signals: water-stained ceiling tile bowing downward
gap in ceiling grid with missing tile
crumbled tile edge with visible ductwork above

description: AED cabinet blocked from view or access by furniture, signage, or stored items
visual_signals: poster hung over AED wall cabinet
vending machine positioned in front of AED
AED cabinet door blocked by stacked chairs

description: Wet floor area in corridor or break room without visible caution signage or barriers
visual_signals: water on break room floor with no sign
mopped hallway without wet floor cone
spill near water cooler with no caution marker

description: Sprinkler head obstructed by stored materials, shelving, or ceiling-hung items within required 18-inch clearance below deflectors
visual_signals: boxes stacked to within inches of ceiling sprinkler head
decorations or banners hanging from sprinkler pipe
tall shelving unit with items stored above sprinkler deflector level

description: Fire-rated door propped open with wedge, doorstop, or disabled self-closing mechanism preventing automatic closure
visual_signals: rubber wedge jammed under fire-rated door
self-closing arm disconnected or held with wire
fire door tied open with rope or bungee cord

description: Stairwell used for storage with boxes, equipment, cleaning supplies, or debris blocking egress path
visual_signals: cardboard boxes stacked on stairwell landing
mop bucket and cleaning supplies stored on stairway treads
office furniture placed against stairwell wall reducing passage width

description: Elevator inspection certificate expired, missing from cab interior, or not posted in visible location
visual_signals: empty frame where elevator certificate should be displayed
inspection certificate with past-due date visible
elevator cab interior wall with no posted certificate or blank placard

description: Workstation monitor positioned at improper height causing visible neck strain, not at eye level when seated
visual_signals: monitor placed flat on desk surface well below eye level
laptop screen on low surface without riser or stand
monitor tilted at extreme upward angle on top of stacked books

description: Office chair with broken armrest, torn seat fabric, non-functioning height adjustment, or missing casters
visual_signals: office chair with cracked or missing armrest
chair seat cushion visibly torn with exposed foam padding
chair base with missing or broken caster wheel

description: Keyboard and mouse placement causing visible wrist strain with no ergonomic support or improper desk height
visual_signals: keyboard placed on surface too high forcing raised shoulders
wrist resting at sharp angle on desk edge without pad
keyboard and mouse at different heights on mismatched surfaces

description: Server room or IT closet showing overheating indicators including propped doors, missing blanking panels, or combustible storage
visual_signals: server closet door propped open with fan blowing inward
cardboard boxes stored on floor of server rack room
server rack with missing blanking panels and visible hot air recirculation

description: Server room lacking proper ventilation or cooling with visible heat damage indicators on equipment
visual_signals: discolored or warped plastic on server equipment from heat
portable fan placed in server closet as sole cooling source
condensation on server room walls indicating HVAC failure

description: Break room microwave with damaged door seal, cracked housing, or scorched interior indicating fire risk
visual_signals: microwave door with bent or missing seal gasket
burn marks or scorch stains inside microwave interior
cracked microwave housing with visible internal components

description: Break room refrigerator with damaged door gasket, excessive frost buildup, or visible mold growth indicating health hazard
visual_signals: refrigerator door seal peeling or cracked allowing gap
heavy frost or ice buildup inside refrigerator or freezer compartment
visible mold growth on refrigerator interior surfaces or shelves

description: Break room or kitchen appliance power cords frayed, cracked, pinched behind counters, or showing exposed wiring
visual_signals: appliance cord with cracked or frayed insulation near plug
power cord pinched between counter and wall with visible wear
electrical tape wrapped around damaged section of appliance cord

description: Restroom wet floor without caution signage, missing ADA-compliant grab bars, or empty soap dispensers creating hygiene risk
visual_signals: wet restroom tile floor with no caution sign placed
toilet stall missing required ADA grab bar on side wall
soap dispenser visibly empty or broken off wall mount

description: Emergency evacuation map not posted, outdated, or missing from required locations near exits and stairwells
visual_signals: blank wall space near exit where evacuation map should be mounted
faded and outdated floor plan map with old company name or layout
evacuation map frame present but map insert missing or illegible

description: First aid kit missing, empty, inaccessible, or with expired supplies in workplace common area
visual_signals: first aid kit cabinet open showing depleted or empty compartments
first aid kit mounted in locked closet with no key access visible
first aid supplies scattered with expired medication packets visible

description: Fire alarm pull station blocked by furniture, obscured by signage, or missing required identification marking
visual_signals: bookcase or filing cabinet placed directly in front of fire alarm pull station
poster or notice board covering fire alarm pull handle on wall
fire alarm pull station without red paint or identifying signage nearby

description: Smoke detector or carbon monoxide detector missing, disconnected, covered, or showing low battery indicator
visual_signals: ceiling location with disconnected wires where smoke detector was removed
smoke detector with plastic bag or tape covering sensor openings
detector on ceiling with blinking red low-battery indicator light

description: Visible mold growth or water damage on walls, ceilings, or around window frames indicating moisture intrusion
visual_signals: dark spotty mold patches spreading on drywall surface near floor
brown water stain rings on ceiling tiles with bubbling paint
black mold growth visible around window frame caulking and sill

description: Outdoor designated smoking area located too close to building entrance, lacking proper butt receptacles, or creating litter hazard
visual_signals: cigarette butt receptacle positioned within ten feet of main entrance door
cigarette butts littered on ground near building entryway without receptacle
smoking area sign posted adjacent to air intake vent or window

description: Parking garage serving office building with insufficient lighting, burned-out fixtures, or missing emergency phone stations
visual_signals: dark zones in parking garage with multiple burned-out ceiling fixtures
emergency call station with out-of-order sign or missing handset
parking level with no visible emergency phone or intercom station

description: Exit sign missing, unlit, or not visible from the normal path of egress travel in corridors or open floor areas
visual_signals: dark unlit exit sign above corridor doorway
corridor intersection with no directional exit sign visible
exit sign with burned-out bulb or dead battery backup

description: Emergency lighting units non-functional, missing, or failing to illuminate egress path during power loss
visual_signals: emergency light unit with no green indicator LED showing charge
empty wall bracket where emergency lighting unit was removed
emergency light fixture with visibly corroded or leaking battery pack

description: Ground fault circuit interrupter outlets missing or non-functional in wet locations including break rooms, restrooms, and kitchens
visual_signals: standard outlet without GFCI protection installed next to break room sink
GFCI outlet with tripped indicator and non-functioning reset button
kitchen counter outlet near water source lacking GFCI test and reset buttons

description: Corridor or aisle width reduced below required 44 inches by furniture, equipment, or stored materials
visual_signals: filing cabinets placed along both sides of narrow corridor
copier or printer positioned in hallway reducing walking width
stacked boxes along corridor wall narrowing the passage

description: Exposed or damaged electrical wiring visible in walls, ceilings, or under desks creating shock or fire hazard
visual_signals: bare copper wire visible where insulation has been stripped away
damaged conduit with wires protruding from wall or ceiling
junction box with missing cover plate exposing wire connections
